summary: Full backend + frontend E2E testing of SEO Framework. Backend: 22/23 pytest pass (1 was a test-side assertion bug for email case — fixed in test file; backend correctly lowercases emails). Frontend: every critical flow verified — landing → register/login → dashboard → projects create → audit run → audit detail (with AI plan/issues/raw tabs) → AI Studio meta tag writer (Claude returned title/description/OG/focus keywords) → logout → protected route redirect.

ui_bugs.issue: Header button [data-testid=new-project-btn] click does not open the create-project dialog when projects list is empty; only [data-testid=empty-new-project] (the in-card CTA) opens the dialog. After at least one project exists, new-project-btn works. Likely the header button is hidden/inert when projects.length===0 even though the testid is present.

action_items: (Optional/low) Make [data-testid=new-project-btn] actually open the create dialog from the empty-projects view (currently only the empty-state CTA does).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: 'last_score' update uses overall_score regardless of fetch_failed; for failed fetches result.overall_score is 0 — fine, but consider not updating last_score on fetch_failed audits to avoid skewing average_score on dashboard.
auth.py: cookie secure=False is OK for emergent preview (http) but should be True in production. JWT_SECRET is hard-coded in .env (acceptable for dev).

CORS allow_origins is '*' combined with allow_credentials=True — browsers will reject credentialed CORS requests; should be set to the explicit frontend origin in production. Currently works because frontend also sends Bearer token.
Audit list endpoint trims fields well; good. No backend file is over 700 lines.
No bcrypt-in-env-with-$ expansion issue (hash created at runtime). Seed is idempotent (find_one then insert).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_seo_api.py (new — pytest suite for all backend endpoints)
test_credentials: demo@smallbiz.com / demo1234 (used). admin@seoframework.com / admin123 (seeded, not exercised). Both seeded on startup and verified via login.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 project (E2E_Proj_6670) + 1 audit for example.com under demo user during E2E run. Test pytest suite also creates TEST_-prefixed projects/users which are mostly cleaned up by test_delete_project; registered TEST_user_*@example.com accounts are left in DB (low impact).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints and frontend pages verified working. Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_seo_api.py is the regression suite — re-run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_seo_api.py -v` (~85s, AI tests take most of that). Demo creds: demo@smallbiz.com / demo1234. AI calls to Claude Sonnet 4.6 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY return real JSON content (verified meta-tags returns titles/descriptions/og/focus_keywords; audit returns overall_score=68 for example.com with 6 issues and full ai_recommendations.priority_actions). One known minor UI quirk: the header 'New project' button is non-functional on the empty-projects view — the empty-state CTA must be used instead.
rca of the issue: No critical issues. Minor: header new-project-btn no-op on empty state is likely a conditional render/onClick handler attachment issue in Projects.jsx around lines 69-122 — there are two distinct buttons with testids new-project-btn (header) and empty-new-project (card CTA). Verified that only the card CTA opens the dialog when no projects exist. After a project is created, new-project-btn opens the dialog correctly.
